name: Crisp Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large bowl with a mixer on medium speed, beat the margarine and peanut butter until smooth.
3. Beat in the sugars until blended.
4. Beat in the eggs and vanilla.
5. Add the flour mixture and beat well. If necessary, chill the dough.
6. Shape into 1-inch balls.
7. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet, 2 inches apart.
8. Flatten each ball with a floured fork, making a crisscross pattern.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
11. Makes 6 dozen cookies.
